M32.name: Task Planner
M32.e2eGreenCountNote: E2E green count reported by Playwright is 9 (one spec has 2 test cases); spec-file count is 8.

notes: M33 (Copilot Service) T3 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit c6b40ae). CopilotEventWindow — in-memory per-company rolling buffer feeding T4's CopilotAnalyzerService. Bounded deque (MAX_EVENTS_PER_COMPANY=100 private const, NOT a user setting in M33), FIFO eviction on overflow, warm-start hydration from eventsRepo.listByCompany on first snapshot per company (hydrated: Set<string> flag prevents re-hydration). Subscribes to the event bus via rag-indexer pattern (start/stop + unsubscribe handle). Defensive-copy on snapshot (spread) so T4's prompt-builder iteration cannot be mutated by live push+shift. Filters token.delta at boundary (~50-500 events/turn would pin the window to streaming noise). clear(companyId) public method shipped but NOT wired to companies.archive — that IPC does not exist in the codebase today (companies repo has create/getById/getBySlug/list/setStatus only); archive-clear wiring deferred to the milestone that adds companies.archive. parseRow helper duplicated from orchestrator/event-bus.ts (module-private there); flagged for shared-module extraction if a third consumer appears. Composition root: instantiated after ragIndexer.start() with same bus+eventsRepo deps, handled in will-quit shutdown alongside rag indexer. Tests +8 (1052 → 1060, exact match to plan target): bounds (3), isolation (2), warm-start (2 including defensive-copy verification), archive-clear (1).

M33 (Copilot Service) T2 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 4ce9d3e). system-copilot pseudo-employee — second is_system=1 row per company alongside M31's system-agent. NEW role card role-packs/strategia-official/roles/system/system-copilot.md (117 lines, level: system, tools_allowed: M31 read-only set + query_copilot_insights, tools_denied locks out decompose_project / delegate_subtask / review_deliverable / shell / filesystem / network / send_message_to_colleague). NEW packages/shared-types/src/roles.ts exports SYSTEM_AGENT_ROLE_ID, SYSTEM_COPILOT_ROLE_ID, SYSTEM_ROLE_IDS tuple, isSystemRoleId() predicate — future-proofing for point-check call sites. system-agent-bootstrap.ts extended with ensureSystemCopilot + shared ensureSystemEmployee internal; legacy EnsureSystemAgent{Args,Result} kept as type aliases for M31 callers. seed.ts seeds system-copilot inline after system-agent; SeedResult gains systemCopilotId. Filter sweep verified as auto-covered — role-loader.listRoles filters level !== 'system' (line 267), listVisibleByCompany filters is_system = false, agentic-tools-write filters !e.isSystem at line 761 + returns 0 in computeRoleFit/scoreEmployee for isSystem candidates. Tests +4 (1048 → 1052): ensureSystemCopilot fresh-create + idempotent re-run + both-system-roles-coexist + listVisibleByCompany-hides-both + makePairLookup() fixture. seed.test.ts assertions updated 3 rows → 4 rows post-seed.

M33 (Copilot Service) T1 SHIPPED (2026-04-16, commit 0a77d87). Migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo with 6 methods (create/getById/listActive/dismiss/expireStale/upsertWithDedup) + 15 unit tests. Dedup contract: category-scoped + numeric-drift guard + Jaccard bigram > 0.8 — locked order, cheap rejections first. Same commit flipped Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row 📋 → 🚧 In progress — 2 of 11 tasks shipped (2026-04-16).
M33 T0 SHIPPED (2026-04-16T08:15Z, commit c5cdeee). Plan doc at docs/plans/2026-04-16-team-x-phase-5-m33-copilot-service.md — 292 lines, 11 tasks (T0–T10), mirrors M32 structural template.

M33 task breakdown: T1 migration 0011 + CopilotInsightsRepo ✅, T2 system-copilot role card + ensureSystemCopilot, T3 rolling event window + bus subscription, T4 CopilotAnalyzerService (periodic scheduler + LLM + dedup + expiry), T5 copilot.* IPC surface, T6 copilot.ask via agentic harness + query_copilot_insights tool, T7 copilot settings + UI, T8 test-copilot-provider canned seam, T9 copilot-service.spec.ts E2E, T10 docs + verification + milestone marker. Targets: +~25 unit tests, +1 E2E spec, ≤34 lint warnings, 0 lint errors, typecheck clean.

M32 (Task Planner — write-side) COMPLETE (2026-04-16T07:20Z). All 11 tasks shipped. 1033/1033 unit tests, 9/9 Playwright cases across 8 spec files green, 0 lint errors / 24 warnings, typecheck clean across all 6 packages.

M32 ABI rebuild dance is now documented as verified T10 procedure: Node ABI via `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npx node-gyp rebuild --release` + same for keytar (pnpm rebuild is a no-op because pnpm's content-addressed store already has the hashed artifact). Electron ABI via `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar`. Pattern: Node rebuild → vitest → Electron rebuild → Playwright. M33 T1 re-verified this dance — bindings were stale from prior E2E (ABI 125), node-gyp rebuild → vitest green at 1048/1048.

Patterns proven across M30/M31/M32 and active for M33: three-tier canned test seam (classifier + provider + tools), {rows, truncated} envelope for agentic tools, data-step-kind as stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController-driven stop with canceled-status coercion, per-task atomic commits + Loki ledger commits (chore(loki): M<N> T<N> — commit ledger (<sha>)), ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system column + filter-sweep pattern (extended in M33 T2 with isSystemRoleId predicate).
